titleStmt.title: SII 20.299: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 299. (B.K. No. 39 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the Svāmiliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record, in characters of about the 12th Century A.D., registers a gift of tolls on certain articles of merchandise for the benefit of the temple of Svayaṁbhu-Sōmanātha of Kaḍalevāḍa, by the Mummuridaṇḍas from thirty-six centres, who had assembled as mahā-nāḍu. It also registers a gift by Dūḷarasa who was the nāḍa-bīravaṇiga.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanavikhyātaruṁ paṁcasatavīrasāsanalabdhānēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritaruṁ satyaThis is
saucacārucaritranayavinayavijñānaruṁ vīrabaṇaṁjudharmmapratipāḷaruṁ viśu
ddhaguḍḍadhvajaruṁ viśāḷavakṣasthaḷaruṁ bhuvanaparākramaruṁ vāsudēvakaṁṇḍaḷimū ḷa
śōdbhavaruṁ bhalluṁkidaṁṇḍahastaruṁ Eṁṭunāḍa padinaṟuvaruṁ haṁnnavaṇigaruṁ mūva
ttāṟubīḍu muṁmmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu kaḍalevāḍada maneyalu mahānāḍāgirṛdu kaḍale
vāḍada śrīsvayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara Aṁgabhōgakke biṭṭa dharma Aṁgaḍi gāṇa he ḍage
yaleṁṇne Uppa māruvavaru Ettinalu hēṟuva seṭṭigaḷe Eleya hēṟiṁge nūṟele baḍagi kaṁmmā
ṟa Akkasāle Asaga saṁmmagāṟa deḍa holeyara kūḍe voḷagāgi purada bīra
vaṇavaṁ biṭṭaru . biṭṭa javaḷakke hattaḍake . Arisina Āla sarkkare . biṭṭa javaḷakke Ayvala hatti
ya maḷavegeyvalaṁ . biṭṭa hēṟiṁge mūlevatta voṁmmāna . Īlli tuṁbuvaḍaṁ mūlevatta vommāna
hoṁge vīsavaṁ tiṟuvaru . kuṁbārara kaṁpege maḍake 1 . Iṁntī dharmmavanāru biṭareṁdu nō
ḍidavana putra mitrakaḷatrādigaḷādiyāgi vaṁsakṣayavakku bāyalu kōṣṭi nōḍu
gu . Arasiṁgaṁ samastanāḍiṁgaṁ Īdiru . nāḍa bīravaṇiga dūḷarasanuṁ biṭṭa .
Digital edition of SII 20.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
